known_issues: draft-editor: disallowed origin error for https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz reported by Google Search Console

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove or replace all references to the draft subdomain URL (https://everyday-silver-qev-draft.caffeine.xyz) from every file that contains canonical URLs, Open Graph tags, Twitter Card tags, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap entries, robots.txt directives, and Google Site Verification tags. All such references must exclusively point to the production domain https://verdiercouverture.fr.
